analysis:
DEMO OUTPUT — Chart Analysis:

1) WHAT THE CHART SHOWS: Monthly revenue from Jan 2023 to Dec 2024 with a trend line overlay showing consistent upward growth.

2) KEY FINDINGS: Revenue grew from approximately $100k to $292k over 24 months — a 192% increase. The trend line shows strong linear growth of ~$8k per month.

3) ANOMALIES: Month 6 shows a dip below trend suggesting a one-time disruption. Month 18 shows a spike above trend.

4) RECOMMENDATIONS: Investigate month 6 dip. Forecast next 3 months using the fitted trend. Consider seasonal decomposition.
